SEARCH
Package net.leaderos.shared.modules

Interface Modulable

All Known Implementing Classes:
AuthModule, AuthModule, AuthModule, BazaarModule, CacheModule, ConnectModule, ConnectModule, ConnectModule, CreditModule, CreditModule, CreditModule, DiscordModule, DiscordModule, DiscordModule, DonationsModule, LeaderOSModule, VoucherModule, WebStoreModule
public interface Modulable
Interface Module class
Since:
1.0
Author:
poyrazinan

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addDependency(String dependency)
    Add dependency to module.
    List<String>
    getDependencies()
    Returns dependency tree of module.
    String
    getDependencyListAsString()
    Gets dependency list as string data for placeholders or messages.
    @NotNull String
    getName()
    Returns the name of the plugin.
    boolean
    isEnabled()
    Returns a value indicating whether this module is currently enabled
    void
    onDisable()
    Called when this plugin on disabled
    void
    onEnable()
    Called when this plugin on enabled
    void
    onReload()
    Called when this plugin on reloads
    void
    setEnabled(boolean isEnabled)
    Sets enabled status

  • Method Details

    • getDependencyListAsString

      String getDependencyListAsString()
      Gets dependency list as string data for placeholders or messages.
      Returns:
      String of dependency list.

    • addDependency

      void addDependency(String dependency)
      Add dependency to module.

      If the module works with another module, you can add it with this method.

      Parameters:
      dependency - should be a module and name of it.

    • getDependencies

      List<String> getDependencies()
      Returns dependency tree of module. If there is any module to work with, the module require it for start.
      Returns:
      List of dependency list. (Module Names)

    • isEnabled

      boolean isEnabled()
      Returns a value indicating whether this module is currently enabled
      Returns:
      true if this module is enabled, otherwise false

    • setEnabled

      void setEnabled(boolean isEnabled)
      Sets enabled status
      Parameters:
      isEnabled - boolean status of enabled or not

    • getName

      @NotNull @NotNull String getName()
      Returns the name of the plugin.

      This should return the bare name of the plugin and should be used for comparison.

      Returns:
      name of the plugin

    • onEnable

      void onEnable()
      Called when this plugin on enabled

    • onDisable

      void onDisable()
      Called when this plugin on disabled

    • onReload

      void onReload()
      Called when this plugin on reloads
